introSection: Duplo Dino Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Legoland Windsor in Windsor, Berkshire, England, UK. It is situated in the Duplo Valley themed area and was opened on 14 March 2020.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
A planning application for the installation of a roller coaster was submitted by the park in August 2019. The roller coaster was officially announced on 10 September as Duplo Dream Coaster.

However, later in development, the name was changed to Duplo Dino Coaster, and in January 2020, it was announced that the ride would be opening on 14 March 2020.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Duplo Dino Coaster features jungle scenery throughout the ride. The theme is based on the Duplo product line. It has a similar oval-shaped layout and design to Ba-a-a Express at Europa Park, a similar design of kiddie coaster from Mack Rides. Light blue track and green supports.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is a custom design shaped like DUPLO bricks.

fullText:
Duplo Dino Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Legoland Windsor in Windsor, Berkshire, England, UK. It is situated in the Duplo Valley themed area and was opened on 14 March 2020.

A planning application for the installation of a roller coaster was submitted by the park in August 2019. The roller coaster was officially announced on 10 September as Duplo Dream Coaster.

However, later in development, the name was changed to Duplo Dino Coaster, and in January 2020, it was announced that the ride would be opening on 14 March 2020.

Duplo Dino Coaster features jungle scenery throughout the ride. The theme is based on the Duplo product line. It has a similar oval-shaped layout and design to Ba-a-a Express at Europa Park, a similar design of kiddie coaster from Mack Rides. Light blue track and green supports.

The train is a custom design shaped like DUPLO bricks.
